scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "JAVA,PYTHON,NODE,REACT" --prefix-colors "blue,yellow,cyan,green" "cd ../algo-backtester-java && mvn spring-boot:run" "cd ../quantedge-python && python -m uvicorn main:app --port 8000 --reload" "cd ../Algo-backtester-webserver && npm run dev" "vite"
